retry_reason: Failure of radix_tree_insert is not transient (e.g., duplicate entry would cause EEXIST) and retrying would not change the outcome.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is inserting a btrfs_root into a radix tree, which involves significant non-refcount logic (preload, insertion, bit setting). The btrfs_grab_root call is incidental to the insertion, ensuring the root is not freed while in the tree.
